channel.title: Hackrate Kft. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Hackrate Kft. (hackrate).

item.title: CVE-2026-2345 · 3.6 LOW — Insufficient Origin Validation in Proctorio Chrome Extension postMessage Handlers
item.description: Proctorio Chrome Extension is a browser extension used for online proctoring. The extension contains multiple window.addEventListener('message', ...) handlers that do not properly validate the origin of incoming messages. Specifically, an internal me…
